Compiling neural pathways...
                    Decrypting quantum buffers...
                    Injecting caffeine into RAM...
                    Rebasing reality on main...
                    Deploying the multiverse...
                

            


            

                

                    

                

                0%
            


            

                

                    Download Speed:
                    Testing...
                

                

                    Latency:
                    Measuring...
                

                

                    Assets Loaded:
                    0 / 0
                

                

                    Cache Status:
                    Checking...

                    0 MB/s

DIEGO NEPOMUCENO MARCOS

            
|  Product n' Software Engineering |  Venture Capital n' Portfolio Management |

            
|  Civil Structural Engineer B.Sc. |

            
|  Brazilian/Spanish | @BERlin.de |

            
            

                

                    
About:

                    
- Designing The Products of Tomorrow;
- Edge Technologies crafted with Aesthetic UX;
- Async mode, OOM Seekers, Declarative way, Penguin worshipers;
- Over 15y performing in high paced working environments;
- Building with dreamers in a ice breaker towards disruption!

                    

                    
Experience:

                    
@tl;dr 🚲
> ABOUT
    "At 38 years old holds a B.Sc. as a Civil Structural Engineer, Corporate Analyst for 3y, Investment Banker and Private Equity analyst for 10y, pivoting into Software and Product Engineering. For 5y lived in 5 EU cities, moved over 170+ cities across 40+ countries, with Spanish and Brazilian roots based in Germany."

---

@experiences ⛵
>> COMPUTER SCIENCE
      In a three-years Software Engineering course pursuing a career shift. Projects handling: Data Structures in C, Algorithms in C, System Process in Unix, Network Architecture and Web Servers, Computer Graphics and Games.
>> CAPITAL MARKETS
      For 10 years in Capital Markets, played roles as Investment Banker, Venture Capital Analyst, Portfolio Manager in Wealth Management and Real Estate Private Equity Analyst.
>> CORPORATE BUSINESS
      For 4 years in Real Estate Development played roles in: Business Development, FP&A and Investor Relations.
>> CIVIL ENGINEERING
      For 2 years managed on-site construction of 2 residential towers and builded 9 emergency houses for poverty alleviation.

>>> INTERNATIONAL EXPERIENCE
      For 5 years travelled to 170+ cities over 40+ countries across 5 continents; Lived in 5 european cities, born and raised in São Paulo.
>>> NGO
      For 2 years worked at an NGO on social development and poverty alleviation.
>>> ARMY
      For 1 year forged as a cadet in the Army Reserve Officers' Training Corps; Commissioned as a 2nd Lieutenant, Ordnance Corps.

@studies ✒️
 >> COMPUTER SCIENCE
      Course Software Engineering (3 years); Course Product Management (3 months).
 >> CAPITAL MARKETS
      Specialization in Investment Banking, Private Equity and Portfolio Management (1 year); Course Macro Economics Modeling (3 months).
 >> ENGINEERING
      B.Sc. Civil Engineering (5 years). Majors: Structural, Water and Transportation. Minors: Math and Physics.
 >> LANGUAGES
      Portuguese (Native), English (C1), Spanish (B2), Gallego (B1) and Deutsche (A1); Holds Spanish and Brazilian citizenship.

@personal ⚖️
•  INTERESTS
      Modern Physics (Quantum and Particle), Global Macro, Mediterranean and Vegetarian Cooking, Backpacking, Jazzy Music.
•  ENDURANCE
      Hiking, Rock Climbing, Cycling, Skydiving and Bungee Jump.
•  COMPETING
      Tennis (5y), Handball (3y), Rugby (1y) and Waterpolo (1y).
•  MINDFULNESS
      Aikido, Yoga and Meditation.
•  PURSUITS
      Oceans Seven Endurance, pre-Tour de France cycling and Seven Summits hike.



🔗 https://linktree.diegonmarcos

DIEGO COELHO MARCOS

                
|  Not Following the sun |  Nomadic Life Mode |

                
|  A practicer of the art of being grateful, impermanent and forgiven |

                
|  Portuguese/Galego/Spanish/Englisch und a bissen Deutsche... |

                
                

                    

                        
𓅮𓅯𓅰𓅧

                        

                        
__

                        

                        
"I'm sorry
Please forgive me
Thank u
I Love u"

                        
__

                        

                        
"be Humble
stay Hungry
always Hustle"

                        
__

                        

                        
"Quod obstat viae, fit via"

                        
__

                        

                        
"शून्यता 道"

                        
.
.
.

                        
"सि द्  ध र्थ"
